name: Bald Eagle Call
ecosystem: Water/forest interface. Rivers, coasts, large trees for nesting.
conservation: Least Concern (IUCN). Recovered from near-extinction. Delisted from US ESA 2007.

vocalization.description: Thin, descending series of 4-10 high-pitched notes: kee-kee-kee-kee
vocalization.function: Mate coordination, adult-chick communication, low-level territorial awareness
vocalization.notable: Hollywood uses Red-tailed Hawk call instead -- actual Bald Eagle call too thin for cinema

connections.description: Love Battery (E=5, Sub Pop, psychedelic). Both project depth through texture. Acoustic thin-ness vs. fuzz-haze.
Bald Eagle territorial call -- louder, more aggressive, E=6. The public declaration follows the private voice.
Osprey (FIRST PANDIONIDAE). Franklin's complaint: eagle steals fish from osprey. Kleptoparasitism.
